'''Guanolta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked for the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Guanolta was wanted by the [[Malastarian Art Union]] for the mixing of several sets of rare paint in a public display of Malastarian art and the sale of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to the young [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]]. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] would go on to claim this bounty.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
